name: Research Agent
description: Sell receipt-gated research digests, reports, watchlists, and analysis outputs.
whatItDoes: Builds premium reports or recurring research feeds.
Unlocks full output only after receipt verification.
Can attach builder fees and webhooks to paid access.
receiptProofBehavior: Preview content can be free while full output is paid.
Receipt ID is logged with report delivery.
suggestedPrompt: Create a receipt-gated research report agent using DNA x402. Show a free preview, quote the full report, verify the signed receipt, unlock the full report, and include builder fees in the visible fee waterfall.
